## 💡 Suggestion

What should change on the site, and why?

> ℹ️ Feature requests for the **SudoSodoku app itself** belong in the
> [app repository](https://github.com/SudoSodokuApp/SudoSodoku/issues) instead.

## 📐 Fit

This site is deliberately plain HTML + CSS with no build step, no
external requests, and no JS unless indispensable (see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). How does your suggestion fit
those constraints?

## 📸 Mockups / References

If applicable.
